candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row explicitly tied to COGS/COR. However, it is shown with no values in the excerpt, so there is no visible separate amount to add relative to the selected parent row 'Production costs'.
This is SG&A/admin-related, not COGS-related, so it does not belong in the COGS_DA bucket.
Although it is an amortisation row, it sits under 'Special Items' rather than the core operating COGS bucket, so it should be ignored for this task.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Production costs'. The only relevant COGS D&A line is blank in the preview, so no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row explicitly tied to admin/SG&A. However, it is shown with no values in the excerpt, so there is no visible separate amount to add relative to the selected XSGA bucket including 'Administrative expenses'.
This is tied to COGS/COR rather than SG&A/admin, so it does not belong in XSGA_DA.
This amortisation appears under 'Special Items', which is outside the core SG&A operating bucket for this task and should be ignored.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket includes 'Selling, General & Admin' and 'Administrative expenses'. The explicit admin D&A row is blank in the excerpt, and there is no separate R&D row to evaluate. Therefore no separate XSGA D&A row should be added.
